compiled_state.title: Subdivide tests/unit/rebar_reconciler into component subdirs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
The 131-file flat reconciler test package -> 7 component buckets: apply (24), mutate (22), diffing (21), orchestrate (21), state (18), conflict (16), fetch (9). conftest.py (the _seed_dotted_namespace shadow) + __init__.py stay at the package root and compose down; each bucket is a subpackage (__init__.py).

## Key gotcha (documented for tangly-abbey-smelt)
Bucket dir names MUST NOT match an engine module name. The conftest extends rebar_reconciler.__path__ to the engine dir, so a test subpackage named e.g. rebar_reconciler.mutation SHADOWS the engine's mutation.py, breaking 'from rebar_reconciler.mutation import MutationDirection'. Used apply/diffing/mutate (not applier/differ/mutation) to avoid colliding with applier.py/differ.py/mutation.py.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] 131 files in 7 non-colliding component buckets; root keeps conftest+__init__
- [x] parents[N] engine anchors bumped one level deeper (incl. non-standard forms), source-logic parents[4] strings left intact
- [x] unit tier count-neutral (890), reconciler tier 870 green, 0 isolation-guard hits
